meta.style: Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, emoji-faced mob characters

scenes.text: えっ、中国って{red:EV大国}じゃなかったんすか？なんで{red:ガソリンスタンド}に大行列できてるんすか？
scenes.description: 少年がスマホでガソリンスタンド行列のニュースを見て驚く冒頭シーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A chibi boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) facing the viewer with a shocked expression, holding a smartphone showing a photo of a massive gas station queue. Amy-sensei (silver/white long hair, blue eyes, red/maroon blazer) standing next to him with a knowing expression. A Chinese flag and gas pump icon in the background. Dramatic red and dark blue lighting.

scenes.text: {red:3月9日}の夜、中国全土でガソリンが1リットル{red:0.55元}値上げされたの。北京、上海、深圳、成都、あらゆる都市のスタンドに長蛇の列ができたわ。
scenes.description: 深夜のガソリンスタンドに殺到するモブ群衆、車の大行列
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A nighttime gas station scene in China. A massive queue of cars stretching into the distance with headlights glowing. Dozens of emoji-faced mob characters (😤😰😩) crowding around gas pumps. A digital price sign showing '0.55元 ↑' in red. City skyline of Beijing/Shanghai in the background with neon lights. A clock showing midnight. Dark blue night sky with orange gas station lighting.

scenes.text: たった{red:0.55元}って、日本円で{red:11円}くらいっすよね？それで深夜に並ぶんすか？
scenes.description: モブ市民が深夜に給油待ちの列に並ぶ、小さなコインを見つめる
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A comparison scene. Left side: a tiny Chinese coin (0.55元) with a magnifying glass. Right side: a Japanese 11 yen equivalent shown small. Below, emoji-faced mob characters (😤😠) in pajamas standing in a long midnight queue at a gas station, some yawning, some angry. Clock showing 2 AM. Dark blue nighttime atmosphere.

scenes.text: 中国の平均月収は約{red:6000元}、日本円で{red:12万円}よ。日本の感覚だと1リットル{red:30円}の値上げに相当するわ。50リットル入れたら{red:1500円}の差、庶民には大きいの。
scenes.description: 月収比較データパネル：中国6000元=12万円、ガソリン値上げの体感差

scenes.text: でも{red:EV大国}なんだから関係なくないっすか？
scenes.description: EVと給油所が共存するモブの街並み、EVの横をガソリン車が通る
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A Chinese city street. On one side, shiny new EVs at a charging station with a '⚡EV大国' banner. On the other side, a long queue of regular gasoline cars at a gas station. Emoji-faced mob drivers (😤) waiting impatiently. The contrast between the 'EV dream' and gasoline reality. Bright green vs dark red split lighting.

scenes.text: ここが最大の矛盾よ。中国の自動車保有台数{red:3.4億台}のうち、純粋なEVはまだ約{red:15%}。残りの{red:85%}はガソリン車かハイブリッドなの。
scenes.description: EV比率データパネル：保有台数3.4億台、EV15% vs ガソリン85%の円グラフ

scenes.text: マジっすか！メディアは{red:EVだらけ}みたいに言ってたじゃないっすか！
scenes.description: 少年がテレビの報道に騙されていたことに気づく
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: The chibi boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) facing the viewer with an angry, betrayed expression. Behind him, a large TV screen showing a news anchor emoji-faced mob (😎) with 'EV革命!' headline, but the screen is cracking to reveal the real street full of gasoline cars. A 'FAKE' stamp partially visible. Dramatic red lighting.

scenes.text: 新車販売のEV比率が{red:50%}を超えただけで、走ってる車の大半はまだガソリン車よ。しかも本当に怖いのは値上げの{red:原因}なの。
scenes.description: 新車EV vs 走行中のガソリン車の対比、道路風景
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: Split scene. Top: A shiny new car showroom with '新車販売 EV 50%!' banner, gleaming EVs. Bottom/main: A busy highway packed with gasoline cars (90% of traffic), exhaust fumes rising, only a few EVs scattered among them. Emoji-faced mob drivers (😅) in gasoline cars. A large text overlay '走ってる車 = ガソリン車'. Contrasting clean green top vs smoggy bottom.

scenes.text: 原因ってなんすか？中国の原油輸入の約{red:3割}は{red:イラン}と{red:ベネズエラ}に依存してるわ。今、トランプ政権がイランへの制裁を強化して、{red:ホルムズ海峡}の緊張が高まってるの。
scenes.description: 原油タンカーとホルムズ海峡の地政学マップ、制裁の構図
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A geopolitical map scene. Center: A narrow strait (Hormuz) with oil tankers trying to pass through. Left side: Iran and Venezuela flags with oil barrels, connected by red arrows to China. Right side: An emoji-faced mob character representing Trump (blonde hair, suit, 😤 face) holding a large 'SANCTIONS' stamp, blocking the route. A pie chart overlay showing '30% 依存' in red. Dark dramatic military-style lighting with red danger zones.

scenes.text: つまり{red:エネルギーの急所}を握られてるってことっすか！
scenes.description: 巨大な手が石油パイプラインを握りつぶすイメージ
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A dramatic metaphorical image. A giant hand (with American flag sleeve) squeezing a vital oil pipeline that connects to China. Oil drops leaking out. Below, emoji-faced mob characters (😱😰) in a Chinese city looking up in panic. The pipeline is labeled 'エネルギー供給'. Red pressure gauge showing critical levels. Dark dramatic lighting with red danger glow.

scenes.text: そういうこと。{red:EV大国}を名乗りながら、{red:エネルギー安全保障}はむしろ脆くなってるの。石油が止まれば発電所も止まる、EVも充電できなくなるわ。
scenes.description: 停電した街で充電できないEVが放置されているダークなシーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A dark, post-blackout city scene. EVs stranded at dead charging stations with '充電不可' error signs. A power plant in the background with smokestacks stopped, no smoke. Street lights off. Emoji-faced mob characters (😱😭) standing helplessly next to their dead EVs. Amy-sensei (silver hair, red blazer) in the foreground facing the viewer with a grave, serious expression, arms crossed. Dark apocalyptic blue-gray lighting with occasional red warning lights.

scenes.text: ヤバいっす！{red:EV}関係ないじゃないっすか！
scenes.description: モブ群衆がEVとガソリン車両方で困り果てるパニックシーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: Chaos on a Chinese street. On one side, emoji-faced mob characters (😱😤) pushing gasoline cars to empty gas stations. On the other side, emoji-faced mobs pushing dead EVs to dead charging stations. Both sides equally helpless. A large cracked sign reads 'EV大国?' with the question mark emphasized. Red and orange panic lighting, papers flying in the wind.

scenes.text: {red:エネルギー問題}の本質を知りたいかたは、チャンネル登録して続きを待ちなさい。
scenes.description: CTA — エイミー先生と少年がチャンネル登録を呼びかけ
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A cheerful ending scene. The boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) in the center facing the viewer with a big smile, waving and pointing to a large red SUBSCRIBE button. Amy-sensei (silver hair, red blazer) next to him facing the viewer with a warm, confident smile. A thumbs-up icon and bell notification icon float nearby. An energy/lightning bolt motif in the background. Bright warm yellow/orange background with confetti and sparkles.
